items.name_en: 💰 Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
items.name_cn:
💰 Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
【Guaranteed Imported Top Grain Leather, No Split Leather, No Microfiber】
Long Zip Wallet
Black Oblique Print
Number: 2ESBC252YSE_H03E
This long zip wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted from black Oblique print fabric with a black smooth leather interior. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal daily companion.
Main: Cotton, Tech Fabric
Lining: Leather, Tech Fabric
Zip Main Compartment
12 Card Slots
Internal Zip Pocket
Double Cash Compartment
2 Pockets with Triangle Linings
Front with Metal-Plated Copper Alloy Dior Logo
Interior with Dior Embossed Logo
Includes Dust Bag
Size: 19.8 x 11 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits Credit Cards

items.name_en: 💰, High Version
items.name_cn:
💰, High Version
[New Mermaid Lace ❤ Medium]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It accommodates various daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model Number: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: 💰. 25c Kelly Black Hardware
items.name_cn:
💰. 25c Kelly Black Hardware
Size: 13*19*7cm
25c Spring/Summer, a new Kelly color is out. Not only clothes, but bags have great designs too. But I have to say, the bag is really amazing. It feels like my wallet can't hold it. As a design inspiration, Kelly is elegant yet gentle. The vintage replica has a strong French retro feel. I really love it!
Style No. AS4416

items.name_en: 💰. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
items.name_cn:
💰. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
Size: 19*13*7cm
24A Kelly Burgundy, it's really cute to me. This season's most requested, another vintage fashion cycle bag. The 1997 Kelly returns with a chain this time, vintage yet stylish. The 'King of Bags' lives up to its name. Handheld or crossbody, it's all good. Very lightweight with a rich vintage taste, just right. It's a '23k Bag King' worthy of the title. The large size isn't too big; it fits an iPhone Pro but is a bit tight for the Max. Exquisite but not bulky. The interior capacity is sufficient for daily use. The more you look at it, the more you like it. Can't resist the girly heart. Comparison of the two sizes' appeal.
Style No. AS4416

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 💰♥ Another must-have from the Montaigne series
items.name_cn:
💰♥ Another must-have from the Montaigne series
♥ The 30 Montaigne from 2019 attracted me with its rich French style as soon as it was released. The official website launched its extension this year.
♥ The bag body is relatively shorter and wider, the chain design offers several carrying methods, and the shoulder strap is detachable for other favorite retro straps.
♥ Wear it over the shoulder for a sophisticated OL look, or crossbody for a casual and playful vibe. Of course, the capacity is not an issue, meeting the essential needs of daily outings.
Size: 25*16*8 cm
#

items.name_en: 💰♥️❤️❤️30 Montaigne MiniBox Real Shot
items.name_cn:
💰♥️❤️❤️30 Montaigne MiniBox Real Shot
I couldn't take my eyes off it when I first saw it on a runway model!
SA said it's a Fall/Winter style! After waiting for a few months, it finally arrived
I couldn't wait to order one
Once I put it on, I couldn't take it off! Comes with a standard full leather strap
You can also change it to other vintage straps as you like
For Oblique, you can get a set referencing the Saddle bag colors ☑️
30 Montaigne is a bag with a strong French style
Minimalist, high-end, with a casual lazy vibe
Looks good crossbody or as a shoulder bag!!
Currently very limited in domestic boutiques
Hard to find, you may need to book and wait
Although it's a small size, the capacity is quite impressive! Plus a small wallet, power bank~
Everything fits easily!
The space is very good, the most important thing is how beautiful it looks!
Size: 19.5*11.5*5cm
(Original packaging included)
